us_markets.note: Friday May 15 close — volatile week, tech selloff; Monday overnight futures

sp500.note: Pulled back from Thursday's all-time high (7501). Friday selloff erased gains.

dow.note: Below 50,000 again. Lost 537 pts Friday on tech slump. Overnight futures flat.

nasdaq.note: AI rout Friday, DeepSeek news spooked tech names. Nvidia earnings Wed key.

10y_treasury_yield.note: Yields rising on inflation fears + oil spike

wti_crude.note: Overnight futures rising $103.89 — Hormuz premium persisting

gold.note: Pulling back from record high $4,562. Overnight futures ~$4,499

us_markets.key_story: Week ended on a sour note. S&P 500 hit a fresh all-time high Thursday at 7501 but plunged Friday as tech slumped on DeepSeek AI competition fears. Dow lost 537 points. Berkshire's new CEO overhauled portfolio. Kevin Warsh faces Fed rate-cut debate. Overnight: WTI crude edges up to $103.89, Gold pulling back to ~$4,499. This week: Nvidia earnings (Wed) key test for AI narrative, FOMC minutes, housing data.

week_ahead.fed_watch: Warsh's first major test — rate cut debate intensifying

shanghai_composite.note: Flat open expected. Friday closed at 4135.39.

gold_futures.note: Gold futures pulling back from highs

asia_premarket.key_story: China market opens flat. Market digesting Trump-Xi summit outcome — Taiwan ambiguity unresolved. G7 finance ministers to meet on Hormuz situation this week.

hsi.note: Lower on Taiwan tensions after Trump-Xi summit

asia_markets.key_event: Trump-Xi Beijing summit concluded. Taiwan stance ambiguity weighing on sentiment. G7 finance ministers to meet on Hormuz situation.

crypto.note: Crypto dipping overnight with risk-off sentiment. BTC below $77K. ETH down 3.15%.
